notes:
## Summary
Sarah onboarded quickly. Has cleared all required compliance modules and is contributing in standups.

## Wins
- Shipped first PR (config refactor) in week 2 with two reviewers approving without changes.
- Asked thoughtful questions in design reviews; takes notes and follows up.
- Already pairing with two senior engineers each week.

## Areas to develop
- Still building familiarity with the deployment pipeline — assign a small ops-flavoured task in Month 2.
- Could be more proactive in raising blockers — agreed to flag blockers in the daily standup notes.

## Manager feedback
Overall a strong start. No concerns. Continue the buddy-pair cadence and start scoping a first owned feature next sprint.

## Agreed actions
- Sarah: pair with Ravi on the auth-rate-limit ticket.
- Manager: introduce Sarah to the platform team for context on deploy tooling.
- Both: revisit objectives draft before Month 2 check-in.

## Summary
Good progress on code quality and review discipline. Sarah is now consistently picking up tickets from the backlog without prompting.

## Wins
- Owned the auth-rate-limit feature end-to-end. Shipped to staging with telemetry.
- Reviews from peers are positive; reviewers note clear PR descriptions and small commits.
- Volunteered to update the onboarding wiki — useful artifact for the next hire.

## Areas to develop
- Estimation is still optimistic — we'll review story-point sizing together for the next two sprints.
- Test coverage on the auth feature was thin; agreed to backfill before promoting to prod.

## Manager feedback
Track is solidly 'Strong'. Comfortable extending scope of owned work.

## Agreed actions
- Sarah: backfill auth tests this sprint.
- Sarah: pair with Maya on estimation for the next two planning sessions.
- Manager: include Sarah in the architecture review on Thursday.
Working independently on scoped tasks.
Feature ownership continues to improve.
Prepare review of sprint contributions and demo readiness.
Final probation decision review.
Good first month with clear customer interactions.
Pipeline reporting needs to improve.
Manager to reschedule and review missed prep items.
Focus on forecast confidence and account strategy.

Campaign planning is on schedule.

Settled into reporting cycles quickly.
Strong attention to detail and accuracy.

Formal completion recorded.
Good early progress on operating procedures.
Improved coordination with support teams.
Still needs more consistency during escalation handoffs.
Extended probation checkpoint and coaching review.
Review cross-team handoff improvements.
Final extension decision checkpoint.
